column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-privacy-permissions (pp-01 … pp-06).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES the .swift-side API uses ONLY — the LLM agent then READS Info.plist + PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy
# BY HAND (SKILL.md ORIENT/READ) to decide: a use is a finding ONLY when its required declaration is ABSENT
# from the config. The shared runner is *.swift-only — the two config files are NOT scanned here.
# Full ❌→✅ + the per-API key map: ../references/usage-strings-and-manifest.md (routed from SKILL.md).

column4: camera/mic/contacts/location API — REPORT only if its matching Info.plist usage string is ABSENT (NSCameraUsageDescription/NSMicrophoneUsageDescription/NSContactsUsageDescription/NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription). Missing string = HARD CRASH on first use (pp-01). READ Info.plist by hand.

Photos API in use — VERIFY NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription (or NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription for add-only) is in Info.plist (pp-02; usage-string seam with document-picker-permissions → cross_ref). READ Info.plist by hand.

required-reason API (UserDefaults/file-timestamp/system-boot-time/disk-space) — VERIFY an NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes entry exists in PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy (pp-03; missing = App-Store REJECT). READ the manifest by hand.

app-tracking-transparency in use — REPORT if NSUserTrackingUsageDescription is absent OR PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy NSPrivacyTracking/NSPrivacyTrackingDomains is unfilled (pp-04; crash + reject). verify-SDK floor (AppTrackingTransparency, not in catalog). READ Info.plist + manifest by hand.

deep-link / universal-link entry — VERIFY an apple-app-site-association file + the Associated Domains entitlement back the link (pp-05, advisory; scene-event lifecycle = app-lifecycle-background → cross_ref). onOpenURL is iOS 14.0 (catalog).

notification-authorization / StoreKit 2 purchase — VERIFY: a notification authorization request is paired with a registered delegate; a Product.purchase() has a Transaction.updates listener that finishes transactions (pp-06, advisory). StoreKit/UserNotifications are verify-SDK (not in catalog).
